markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content progress, PSEO strategy, and 2026 planning.](https://fathom.video/share/4XPXGsK8AgY_5Z77Pby9btCQaW1p9khM?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Blog Content:** Two comparison articles, created without battle cards, are ready for Chris's review to validate quality and decide whether to proceed with the remaining 3–4 planned articles.](https://fathom.video/share/4XPXGsK8AgY_5Z77Pby9btCQaW1p9khM?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)
  - [**PSEO Strategy:** To de-risk the high-volume content plan, a small batch of articles (e.g., 3–4) will be produced for SME review. This will validate the AI-generated content's accuracy before scaling production.](https://fathom.video/share/4XPXGsK8AgY_5Z77Pby9btCQaW1p9khM?tab=summary&timestamp=674.0)
  - [**2026 Planning:** A strategy session is set for \~2 weeks from now, after Hyperexponential's internal OKRs are finalized. This will reset the strategy to align with current business goals.](https://fathom.video/share/4XPXGsK8AgY_5Z77Pby9btCQaW1p9khM?tab=summary&timestamp=948.0)
  - [**AI Visibility Tool:** GrowthX will roll out its new B2B-focused AI visibility platform, providing direct client access to better track high-intent buyer journey touchpoints.](https://fathom.video/share/4XPXGsK8AgY_5Z77Pby9btCQaW1p9khM?tab=summary&timestamp=1157.0)

## Topics

### Blog Content & Reporting

  - [**Progress:** New blog content is going live.](https://fathom.video/share/4XPXGsK8AgY_5Z77Pby9btCQaW1p9khM?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
      - [Two comparison articles are staged for review.](https://fathom.video/share/4XPXGsK8AgY_5Z77Pby9btCQaW1p9khM?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)
      - [Franki will add these to Chris's agenda for feedback on quality.](https://fathom.video/share/4XPXGsK8AgY_5Z77Pby9btCQaW1p9khM?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)
  - [**Reporting:**](https://fathom.video/share/4XPXGsK8AgY_5Z77Pby9btCQaW1p9khM?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)
      - [Bailey will send a Looker report update by Friday to establish a post-new-site baseline.](https://fathom.video/share/4XPXGsK8AgY_5Z77Pby9btCQaW1p9khM?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)
      - [The report will be updated to track performance by new blog categories (now live in Framer) in addition to topic clusters.](https://fathom.video/share/4XPXGsK8AgY_5Z77Pby9btCQaW1p9khM?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)
      - [**Note:** The default category for uncategorized posts is "underwriting."](https://fathom.video/share/4XPXGsK8AgY_5Z77Pby9btCQaW1p9khM?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [**Product Naming Conventions:**](https://fathom.video/share/4XPXGsK8AgY_5Z77Pby9btCQaW1p9khM?tab=summary&timestamp=336.0)
      - [A product-specific naming guide is drafted, pending internal review from Dayan before being shared with GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/4XPXGsK8AgY_5Z77Pby9btCQaW1p9khM?tab=summary&timestamp=336.0)
      - [This will enable a universal update across all content and systems.](https://fathom.video/share/4XPXGsK8AgY_5Z77Pby9btCQaW1p9khM?tab=summary&timestamp=336.0)

### PSEO Project Strategy

  - [**GrowthX Progress:**](https://fathom.video/share/4XPXGsK8AgY_5Z77Pby9btCQaW1p9khM?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)
      - [Building the content pipeline and defining the site page structure.](https://fathom.video/share/4XPXGsK8AgY_5Z77Pby9btCQaW1p9khM?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)
      - [Structure decisions balance search volume, SERP analysis, and user intent.](https://fathom.video/share/4XPXGsK8AgY_5Z77Pby9btCQaW1p9khM?tab=summary&timestamp=528.0)
      - [A final structure plan will be delivered to Hyperexponential by early next week.](https://fathom.video/share/4XPXGsK8AgY_5Z77Pby9btCQaW1p9khM?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)
  - [**Hyperexponential Status:**](https://fathom.video/share/4XPXGsK8AgY_5Z77Pby9btCQaW1p9khM?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)
      - [The project is one of four major initiatives being scoped for internal dev resources.](https://fathom.video/share/4XPXGsK8AgY_5Z77Pby9btCQaW1p9khM?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)
      - [This may push the launch date but will not block GrowthX from producing content.](https://fathom.video/share/4XPXGsK8AgY_5Z77Pby9btCQaW1p9khM?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)
  - [**Content Validation Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/4XPXGsK8AgY_5Z77Pby9btCQaW1p9khM?tab=summary&timestamp=674.0)
      - [**Goal:** De-risk the high-volume content plan by validating AI-generated content quality before scaling.](https://fathom.video/share/4XPXGsK8AgY_5Z77Pby9btCQaW1p9khM?tab=summary&timestamp=674.0)
      - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/4XPXGsK8AgY_5Z77Pby9btCQaW1p9khM?tab=summary&timestamp=674.0)
        1.  [Produce a small batch of articles (e.g., 3–4) for key or edge-case topics.](https://fathom.video/share/4XPXGsK8AgY_5Z77Pby9btCQaW1p9khM?tab=summary&timestamp=674.0)
        2.  [Hyperexponential SMEs will review for technical accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/4XPXGsK8AgY_5Z77Pby9btCQaW1p9khM?tab=summary&timestamp=754.0)
        3.  [Feedback will be used to calibrate the AI model, ensuring content meets standards.](https://fathom.video/share/4XPXGsK8AgY_5Z77Pby9btCQaW1p9khM?tab=summary&timestamp=796.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This parallel validation allows content production to continue while internal dev resources are secured.](https://fathom.video/share/4XPXGsK8AgY_5Z77Pby9btCQaW1p9khM?tab=summary&timestamp=896.0)

### 2026 Strategy & Planning

  - [**Strategy Reset:**](https://fathom.video/share/4XPXGsK8AgY_5Z77Pby9btCQaW1p9khM?tab=summary&timestamp=948.0)
      - [A session will be scheduled for \~2 weeks from now to align strategy with current business goals.](https://fathom.video/share/4XPXGsK8AgY_5Z77Pby9btCQaW1p9khM?tab=summary&timestamp=1092.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The original content strategy document is outdated due to the shift to PSEO and new team members (Diane).](https://fathom.video/share/4XPXGsK8AgY_5Z77Pby9btCQaW1p9khM?tab=summary&timestamp=1129.0)
      - [**Input:** Hyperexponential will provide finalized 2026 OKRs and high-level campaign plans.](https://fathom.video/share/4XPXGsK8AgY_5Z77Pby9btCQaW1p9khM?tab=summary&timestamp=1092.0)
  - [**AI Visibility Tool:**](https://fathom.video/share/4XPXGsK8AgY_5Z77Pby9btCQaW1p9khM?tab=summary&timestamp=1157.0)
      - [GrowthX is rolling out a new platform to track AI search visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/4XPXGsK8AgY_5Z77Pby9btCQaW1p9khM?tab=summary&timestamp=1157.0)
      - [**Differentiator:** Focuses on B2B buyer journey touchpoints, filtering out low-value noise from volume-based tools like Scrunch.](https://fathom.video/share/4XPXGsK8AgY_5Z77Pby9btCQaW1p9khM?tab=summary&timestamp=1323.0)
      - [**Action:** Bailey will share a Scrunch report as a baseline and review Hyperexponential's "findability" OKRs to help define clear metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/4XPXGsK8AgY_5Z77Pby9btCQaW1p9khM?tab=summary&timestamp=1230.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Franki:**](https://fathom.video/share/4XPXGsK8AgY_5Z77Pby9btCQaW1p9khM?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)
      - [Add the two comparison articles to Chris's agenda for review.](https://fathom.video/share/4XPXGsK8AgY_5Z77Pby9btCQaW1p9khM?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)
      - [Share the product naming guide with GrowthX after Dayan's internal review.](https://fathom.video/share/4XPXGsK8AgY_5Z77Pby9btCQaW1p9khM?tab=summary&timestamp=336.0)
      - [Provide finalized 2026 OKRs and campaign plans for the strategy session.](https://fathom.video/share/4XPXGsK8AgY_5Z77Pby9btCQaW1p9khM?tab=summary&timestamp=1092.0)
  - [**Bailey:**](https://fathom.video/share/4XPXGsK8AgY_5Z77Pby9btCQaW1p9khM?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
      - [Send the updated Looker report and a baseline Scrunch report by Friday.](https://fathom.video/share/4XPXGsK8AgY_5Z77Pby9btCQaW1p9khM?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)
      - [Deliver the final PSEO site structure plan to Hyperexponential by early next week.](https://fathom.video/share/4XPXGsK8AgY_5Z77Pby9btCQaW1p9khM?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)
      - [Schedule the 2026 strategy session for \~2 weeks from now.](https://fathom.video/share/4XPXGsK8AgY_5Z77Pby9btCQaW1p9khM?tab=summary&timestamp=1092.0)
      - [Prepare to demo the new AI visibility tool in the next meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/4XPXGsK8AgY_5Z77Pby9btCQaW1p9khM?tab=summary&timestamp=1157.0)
